name: Talked to insurance adjuster after chem exposure—did I mess up my claim in Saint George?
description: Call lawyer now—adjusters twist words; don't talk more.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after chem exposure—did I mess up my claim in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call lawyer now—adjusters twist words; don't talk more.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; recorded statements can be used against you—stop communicating and get a lawyer.** Adjusters minimize payouts in Utah comp cases.[6] Key factors: any admissions of fault or downplaying symptoms harm value. Review what was said, demand claim file; lawyer negotiates from here. Most settle better with rep.
